requirement_topic.en: NEA Controlled Goods Registration — Heat Pumps and Air Conditioners
requirement_topic.zh: NEA受管制商品注册——热泵与空调器
requirement_topic.zht: NEA受管制商品註冊——熱泵與空調器

summary.en: Singapore's National Environment Agency (NEA) administers the Consumer Protection (Safety Requirements) Regulations, which designate certain products as Controlled Goods. Air conditioners and heat pump appliances falling within scope must be registered with NEA before they may be imported or sold in Singapore. Registration requires conformity testing to the applicable Singapore Standard (SS 553, aligned to SS EN 60335-2-40 for heat pumps) by an accredited third-party laboratory, and the product must bear the SAFETY mark. The registrant (importer or local supplier) is responsible for maintaining technical files, post-market surveillance obligations, and label compliance. CCC certificates from China are not accepted as Singapore SAFETY mark equivalents.
summary.zh: 新加坡国家环境局（NEA）主管《消费者保护（安全要求）条例》，该条例将特定产品列为受管制商品。属于范围内的空调器和热泵电器在进口或在新加坡销售前须向NEA注册。注册须经认可第三方实验室按适用新加坡标准（SS 553，热泵对应SS EN 60335-2-40）进行符合性测试，产品须加贴SAFETY标志。注册人（进口商或本地供应商）负责维护技术文件、市场后监督义务及标签合规。来自中国的CCC证书不被视为新加坡SAFETY标志的等同凭证。
summary.zht: 新加坡國家環境局（NEA）主管《消費者保護（安全要求）條例》，該條例將特定產品列為受管制商品。屬於範圍內的空調器和熱泵電器在進口或在新加坡銷售前須向NEA註冊。註冊須經認可第三方實驗室按適用新加坡標準（SS 553，熱泵對應SS EN 60335-2-40）進行符合性測試，產品須加貼SAFETY標誌。註冊人（進口商或本地供應商）負責維護技術文件、市場後監督義務及標籤合規。來自中國的CCC證書不被視為新加坡SAFETY標誌的等同憑證。

standards_or_laws: SS 553: 2016 Code of Practice for Air-Conditioning and Mechanical Ventilation in Buildings
SS EN 60335-2-40 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances: heat pumps, air conditioners and dehumidifiers

summary.en: China's CCC mandatory certification regime covers household air conditioners and heat pumps under GB 4706.32 (safety) and GB/T 7725 (performance). CCC applies to products sold in the Chinese domestic market and is administered by CNCA through accredited certification bodies. CCC test reports and certificates are China-market evidence and are not accepted for NEA Controlled Goods registration in Singapore.
summary.zh: 中国CCC强制认证制度依据GB 4706.32（安全）和GB/T 7725（性能）覆盖家用空调器和热泵。CCC适用于中国国内市场销售的产品，由CNCA通过认可认证机构实施。CCC测试报告和证书属于中国市场证据，不被新加坡NEA受管制商品注册接受。
summary.zht: 中國CCC強制認證制度依據GB 4706.32（安全）和GB/T 7725（性能）覆蓋家用空調器和熱泵。CCC適用於中國國內市場銷售的產品，由CNCA通過認可認證機構實施。CCC測試報告和證書屬於中國市場證據，不被新加坡NEA受管制商品註冊接受。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.32 — Household and similar electrical appliances: safety for heat pumps, air conditioners and dehumidifiers
GB 25454 — Heat pump water heaters for hot water supply

gap.en: CCC does not substitute NEA Controlled Goods registration. Chinese exporters must support the Singapore registrant with conformity test evidence to SS EN 60335-2-40 from a SAC-SINGLAS or NEA-accepted accredited laboratory, a complete technical file, Singapore SAFETY mark labelling, and post-market surveillance documentation. The importer or local supplier bears the registration duty and must ensure the product model and configuration tested match exactly what is sold in Singapore.
gap.zh: CCC不能替代NEA受管制商品注册。中国出口商须协助新加坡注册人提供来自SAC-SINGLAS或NEA认可实验室的SS EN 60335-2-40符合性测试证据、完整技术文件、新加坡SAFETY标志标识，以及市场后监督文件。进口商或本地供应商承担注册义务，须确保受测产品型号及配置与在新加坡销售的产品完全一致。
gap.zht: CCC不能替代NEA受管制商品註冊。中國出口商須協助新加坡註冊人提供來自SAC-SINGLAS或NEA認可實驗室的SS EN 60335-2-40符合性測試證據、完整技術文件、新加坡SAFETY標誌標識，以及市場後監督文件。進口商或本地供應商承擔註冊義務，須確保受測產品型號及配置與在新加坡銷售的產品完全一致。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for Controlled Goods scope products before import or sale in Singapore
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for applicable domestic-market products under CCC; not equivalent to Singapore NEA registration

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — NEA Controlled Goods registration to SS EN 60335-2-40 is mandatory before import or sale; CCC evidence does not substitute Singapore SAFETY mark registration.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在重大差距——进口或销售前须完成NEA依据SS EN 60335-2-40的受管制商品注册；CCC证据不能替代新加坡SAFETY标志注册。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在重大差距——進口或銷售前須完成NEA依據SS EN 60335-2-40的受管制商品註冊；CCC證據不能替代新加坡SAFETY標誌註冊。
